title: Launch Comic
description: A reference-dependent four-image series about the same hero, outfit, glowing product orb, and eight-panel comic language.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the protagonist, outfit, glowing GPT-IMAGE-2 orb, manga panel grammar, and launch-story tone; images 02-04 reuse that identity and page language in different locations.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Launch Comic
en.description: A reference-dependent four-image series about the same hero, outfit, glowing product orb, and eight-panel comic language.

zh-CN.title: 发布漫画
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖参考图的系列，保持同一主角、服装、发光产品球和八格漫画语言。
